tools.name: music_play
tools.description: Resume or start playback in Apple Music.

invoke.script:
tell application "Music" to play
return "Playback started"

tell application "Music" to pause
return "Playback paused"

tools.name: music_next
tools.description: Skip to the next track in Apple Music.

invoke.script:
tell application "Music" to next track
return "Skipped to next track"

tools.name: music_previous
tools.description: Go back to the previous track in Apple Music.

invoke.script:
tell application "Music" to previous track
return "Went to previous track"

tools.name: music_now_playing
tools.description: Get the currently playing track name and artist in Apple Music.

invoke.script:
tell application "Music"
  if player state is playing then
    return name of current track & " — " & artist of current track
  else if player state is paused then
    return "Paused: " & name of current track & " — " & artist of current track
  else
    return "Nothing is playing"
  end if
end tell

tools.name: music_set_volume
tools.description: Set the Apple Music playback volume.

invoke.script:
tell application "Music" to set sound volume to {{volume}}
return "Volume set to {{volume}}"

tools.name: music_search_and_play
tools.description: Search the Apple Music library and play the first matching track.

query.description: Song name, artist, or album to search for

invoke.script:
tell application "Music"
  set results to search playlist "Library" for "{{query}}"
  if results is {} then return "No results found for: {{query}}"
  set theTrack to first item of results
  play theTrack
  return "Now playing: " & name of theTrack & " — " & artist of theTrack
end tell
